summary: Successfully tested MyGenie customer app CA-003 price calculation fix. Frontend functionality works correctly with proper price calculations. Cart totals match individual item prices, confirming centralized calculateCartItemPrice() function is working as intended.

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: 404 Not Found - but frontend uses different API endpoints (preprod.mygenie.online)
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Frontend functionality unaffected as it uses alternative API endpoints

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay can block View Cart button clicks occasionally

passed_tests: Backend API health check: GET /api/ returns 'Customer App API' message
Homepage loads with restaurant details (Welcome to 18march!)
Browse Menu page loads and shows 144+ menu items with correct prices
Successfully added multiple items to cart with correct pricing
Individual item prices display correctly in cart
CA-003 centralized price calculation fix verified:
- calculateCartItemPrice() function in helpers.js working correctly
- Used in OrderItemCard.jsx line 26 for item price display
- Used in CartContext.js line 339 for cart total calculation
- Used in ReviewOrder.jsx line 538 for tax calculations
- Cart total matches sum of individual item prices
Menu categories and items load correctly (Pepsi, Bar, Rum, etc.)
Add to cart functionality works for both simple and customizable items
Price formatting displays correctly with ₹ symbol
